name: security-policy
description: Default security gate policy for security-mcp. Copy to .mcp/policies/security-policy.json and customize for your project.

requirements.description: All services enforce authentication + authorization. No implicit trust for any request.
Secrets stored only in a dedicated secret manager. Never in code, env files, logs, or images.
TLS 1.3 mandatory for all in-transit data. TLS 1.0/1.1 strictly prohibited.
Content Security Policy enforced. No unsafe-inline, no unsafe-eval. Nonce-based CSP only.
CSRF protection on all state-mutating endpoints.
SSRF guards on all server-side HTTP calls. Private IP ranges and metadata endpoints blocked.
Mobile apps meet OWASP MASVS L2. iOS ATS strict, Android NSC strict, release builds not debuggable.
AI/LLM outputs validated against JSON schema. Tool calls routed through an allowlist.

artifacts_required.description: A threat model document is required for any change touching these paths.
